name: The Best Bread Pudding You'll Ever Eat
recipeInstructions:
I use 1 pint half-and-half.
Pudding: Break bread into large pieces and place in a baking dish. Combine all ingredients and pour over the bread. Sprinkle cinnamon-sugar mixture over top. Dot with butter and bake at 375°F for one hour. This is best served warm.
Sauce: Combine all sauce ingredients in a saucepan and cook, stirring until thickened.
